name: QR Code Generator
desc: Convert any URL, text, or contact info into a scannable QR code. Download as PNG instantly.

name: Password Generator
desc: Generate strong, random passwords with custom length and character sets. Strength meter included.

name: Word Counter
desc: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs. Estimates reading time and speaking time.

name: JSON Formatter
desc: Format, minify and validate JSON instantly. Syntax highlighted output with auto-format on paste.

name: Base64 Encoder / Decoder
desc: Encode text or files to Base64 or decode Base64 strings back to plain text. File drag & drop supported.

name: URL Encoder / Decoder
desc: Percent-encode URL strings or decode encoded URLs. Supports encodeURIComponent and encodeURI modes.

name: Hash Generator
desc: Generate SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512 hashes from text or files using native browser crypto.

name: Markdown to HTML
desc: Convert Markdown to HTML with a live side-by-side preview. Supports tables, code blocks, and more.

name: Regex Tester
desc: Test regular expressions in real-time. Match highlighting, capture group details, and all JS flags supported.

name: Muslim Baby Names
desc: Browse 1000+ Islamic names for boys and girls with meanings and origins. Parent name matching included.
